name: Coding Harness
description: Coding agent toolkit — Edit, MultiEdit, TodoWrite, background process tools, plan mode, and OI Bridge Tier 1 (5 macOS-unique introspection tools: app usage / clipboard / screenshot / OCR / recent files). Tiers 2-5 removed in 2026-04-25 trim because each overlapped with native OC features. Three Tier-1 tools (read_file_region / search_files / read_git_log) also removed as redundant with built-in Read / Grep+Glob / BashTool.
author: OpenComputer Contributors
